children.name: TopBar
children._comment: M46: route-only controls retained for binder compatibility, but hidden from the HTML parity visual baseline. Canonical gacha HTML has no top header plaque/back/shop strip.

children.name: PoolSubtitleLabel
children.text: 以血脈為種，召來傳世名將

children.name: BannerArtArea
children._comment: M46: restores HTML .banner-art-placeholder composition anchor (480px ? 85% of 880px banner height) before final transparent character art lands.

children.name: PoolNameStrip
children._comment: M42: simplified from 2 layers (Top h=34 + Bottom from y=20) to 1 layer. Two layers overlapped at y=20~34 creating visible dual-band. HTML uses single rgba(0,0,0,.75). Now single PoolNameStripBg covers full height.

children.name: PoolSubtitleLabel
children.text: 以血脈為種，召來傳世名將

children.name: CostCardBg
children._comment: M46: HTML .cost-panel uses a very dark translucent card, not parchment/sepia fill.

children.name: RulesNote
children.text: ✦ 十連保證 SR 以上 1 枚  ✦ 限定武將機率加成 ×1.5\n✦ 保底不跨池累積  ✦ 抽出已擁有武將轉換碎片

children.name: PullBarBgBottom
children._comment: M46: HTML .pull-bar bottom is near-black rgba(0,0,0,.97), not gray/sepia.

children.name: PullBarBgTopWash
children._comment: M46: approximates HTML top of bottom-dock gradient rgba(0,0,0,.8).

children.name: Pull10Hint
children.text: 保證 SR 以上 1 枚

exceptions.no-empty-container: TopSpacer 為純間距容器，意圖為空
